Elba vented clothes dryer available for donation.

Landlady has just sold her property and has asked me to assist in donating the above. VWO or client has to arrange for mover to collect at River Valley at their own expense.

name: Refrigerator
description: Ct is a single mother to 2 youths, 1 of whom is still in school, and 1 is working. Ct has multiple physical and mental health conditions, and has not been able to work for the past years, as she is partially bed-bound. Ct's eldest son is supporting the family, but his salary is insufficient to meet family's basic needs, including ct's medical needs. Ct's daughter juggles school and caregiving of ct. The family's refrigerator has broken down, and they are in need of one to store their perishables.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bukit Panjang
contact.name: Muhammad Idris Bin Mohd Margono

name: Refrigerator
description: Malay family of 3 with young children. The family is struggling financially as one of the parent was recently released from prison. With low education, parents are receiving low salary. Furthermore, the father of the family has a medical condition and needs to purchase medication regularly. Their fridge spoiled recently and with Hari Raya approaching, they will benefit greatly from donation of a fridge.
